description: Style Note You would want to do anything but move on from this watch from fastrack. Minimalistic design yet stylish and trendy, this watch adds an urban touch to your regular outfits. Product Details Case style: Analog watch with a steel round case Dial style: White dial with a pink periphery and steel coloured hands Strap style: Pink leather straps with a tang clasp Features: Screw to reset time Water resistant up to 30 meters protecting it from splashes and rain Warranty: 2 years Material and Care Stainless steel and leather Wipe with a clean and dry cloth when needed Size Case diameter: 34 mm Case thickness: 4 mm
